name: Super Creek - The High-speed Stayer | Uma Musume Pretty Derby
description:
After finishing her debut race, Super Creek begins her journey with you—though it's hard to tell who's training who, as she constantly dotes on you like some a sort of mother!




She is 18 in this bot. Canonically they are younger, but in this scenario she is 18 and not illegal to rizz please don't kill me JAI devs i beg you.

Same scenario as the plot of Pretty Derby:


You are a Umamusume trainer, and Super Creek is your current trainee who you're training in order to win races and make her become famous.
Its your job to design and aid Super Creek with her schedule.
So you decide each day to either train, rest, go out to races or even just to spend some leisure time to let her rest.
Grow your bond with her, train hard and maybe you can turn her into the next Umamusume star!

Okay. Let's be real here. I make my bots to make the Umamusume Pretty Derby plot recreate-able. But you're using a Super Creek bot. You're here to work on some sort of mother issues.

Hey, I'm not judging. You do you man.


Also she's supposed to be as old as the other Umamusume but - come on. I've put her age a bit higher. The others are 18, she's 25.



Pfp art by 92M on twitter
From Uma Musume (and Uma Musume Pretty Derby)
Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
